allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const h=fs.readFileSync\('index.html','utf8'\);const m=[...h.matchAll\(/<script>\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/script>/g\)];let n=0;for\(const s of m\){try{new Function\(s[1]\);n++}catch\(e\){console.log\('ERR block',n,e.message\)}}console.log\('parsed inline blocks OK:',n\)")
